# Pull Request

## Summary
_What does this PR change and why?_

## Related Specification / Document
_Link the specification, ADR, or document this implements. (Documentation precedes implementation.)_

## Type of Change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Infrastructure / Tooling

## Pre-Merge Quality Checklist
- [ ] Folder structure correct
- [ ] Naming consistent
- [ ] No broken links
- [ ] Document references updated
- [ ] Architecture consistent
- [ ] Code quality (clean, modular, SOLID)
- [ ] Security (no secrets, inputs validated)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Version numbers updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
